zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec於大約1120年出生在英國爾諾維其時，她的父親William FitzRichard de Vernon30歲，母親Lucy Tancarville32歲。她於1146年與Richard de la Haye在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年在英國越可爾斯帕爾丁頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德布藍倫德聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec于大约1120年出生在英国爾諾維其时，她的父亲William FitzRichard de Vernon30岁，母亲Lucy Tancarville32岁。她于1146年与Richard de la Haye在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年在英国越可爾斯帕爾丁頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德布藍倫德聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec was born about 1120, in Northwich, Cheshire, England, her father, William FitzRichard de Vernon, was 30 and her mother, Lucy Tancarville, was 32. She married Richard de la Haye in 1146, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1185, in Spaldington, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec est née environ 1120, à Northwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William FitzRichard de Vernon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucy Tancarville, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de la Haye en 1146, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Spaldington, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec um 1120 in Northwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William FitzRichard de Vernon 30 und ihre Mutter Lucy Tancarville 32. Sie hat 1146 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Richard de la Haye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Spaldington, Yorkshire, England und wurde in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec è nata il circa 1120 nel Northwich, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William FitzRichard de Vernon, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lucy Tancarville, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard de la Haye nel 1146, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1185, nel Spaldington, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebecが約1120年にイギリスチェシュアイアノースウィチで生まれた時，父William FitzRichard de Vernonは30歳，母Lucy Tancarvilleは32歳であった。1146年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでRichard de la Hayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプアルディントンで66歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドブランチランドスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Blanchland Abbey, Blanchland, Northumber: 영국 노르스벌랜드 블랭클랜드 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 체실르 노르스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William FitzRichard de Vernon(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Tancarville(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Richard de la Haye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 영국 요르크실르 스팔딩턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 블랭클랜드 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Tancarville, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de la Haye em 1146, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Spaldington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.Blanchland Abbey, Blanchland, Northumber: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бланчланд, нортумбирланд, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec родилась около 1120 г. в местности нортвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William FitzRichard de Vernon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Tancarville, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de la Haye в 1146 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности спалдингтон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бланчланд, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Vernon Lady of Varenguebec nació aproximadamente 1120, en Northwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lucy Tancarville, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard de la Haye en 1146, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1185, en Spaldington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary The Virgin's Church, Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
